title: Regional Vice President of Sales
descriptionhtml:
About Giga

Giga has recently raised a $61M Series A and is working with Fortune 500 customers to deploy the next generation of customer experience — real-time AI agents that can understand emotion, resolve issues instantly, and scale across the world’s largest enterprises.

It’s an exciting inflection point for the company. While we have been successful, we have larger ambitions. Our goal is to become the go-to AI platform for all enterprise automation, powered by our voice superintelligence. To achieve this, we need more great engineers.

The work affects millions of people every day and our engineers have autonomy and make true impact. This opportunity is unique because we have brilliant founders, have found commercial success, and see a clear path to becoming a generational company. Some further info about us:

  • Voice AI startup Giga raises $61M Series A
  • DoorDash and Giga Partnership

Giga builds AI agents trusted by the largest B2C companies in the world. Industry leaders like DoorDash trust Giga with their most complex support and operations workflows across voice, chat, and email. If being a part of this resonates with you, please apply!

About The Role

Our Regional Vice President of Enterprise Sales will provide strategy, mentorship, and guidance for a team of Enterprise Sales Directors who are responsible for driving new business through the full sales cycle.

What You’ll Do

  • Manage, hire, train and ramp a team of Enterprise Sales Directors responsible for new and expansion bookings
  • Develop and manage Enterprise Sales Directors on productivity metrics such as deal size, win rate, and forecast accuracy as well as how to lead a customer through a proactive sales cycle
  • Coach Enterprise Sales Directors through building executive relationships with Named Enterprise accounts in their territories and through complex Enterprise deals and negotiations
  • Inspire a culture of teamwork, leading with value and achieving desired customers outcomes
  • Develop trust-based relationships with customers and partners to ensure Giga’s long-term success
  • Encourage learning and ongoing understanding of technical product details and our future product roadmap
  • Shape the direction of the GTM strategy and execution for your region
  • Establish a revenue growth and investment plan in the first 90 days
  • Deliver our strategic growth plans, in collaboration with the other function leaders, ensure forecast accuracy and a predictable, high-growth business
  • Report on revenue forecast and strategic GTM initiatives

Who You Are

  • Experience as a high-growth enterprise software sales leader with experience leading sales teams serving Named and Strategic customers within the CX, AI, Cloud, or SaaS Sales Industry
  • History of exceeding sales quotas in similar high-growth technology companies
  • Ability to engage with, recruit and hire sales talent in the market
  • Focus and emphasis on methodology-based sales coaching, MEDDPICC and a Challenger mentality
  • Experience of value-based sales with both the business and IT stakeholders including C-suite
  • Experience in leadership roles focused on managing sales organizations to influence, develop, and achieve objectives within CX, AI, Cloud, or SaaS sales
  • Knowledge of the partner ecosystem to help grow Enterprise strategic territories
  • Success implementing strategies for consumption and commitment-based sales revenue models
  • Passionate about coaching others with a successful track record as an individual contributor and can share relevant and complex closing experience with a growing team

Nice to Have

  • Experience selling AI, automation, or CX transformation solutions.
  • Familiarity with large-scale deployments in financial services, telecom, travel, hospitality, logistics, or retail sectors.

Compensation & Benefits

  • Competitive base + commission + equity
  • Catered lunch daily
  • Dinner stipend
  • $150/month wellness benefit (gym, fitness classes, mental health)
  • 401(k) plan
  • Paid parental leave (12 weeks maternal, 6 weeks paternal)
  • Commuter benefits
  • Medical, dental, and vision coverage

Why Giga

At Giga, you’ll sell one of the most advanced enterprise AI platforms on the market — to the world’s most recognized consumer brands. You’ll be joining a team that moves fast, builds fearlessly, and values people who take ownership and drive impact.

If you’re motivated by closing transformative deals and partnering with global enterprises to redefine how they serve their customers, this is your opportunity to make it happen.

Giga is an equal opportunity employer. We're committed to providing equal employment opportunities regardless of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, disability, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

fit_explanation: This job is a good fit for the candidate due to their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and their current focus on building AI systems for B2B sales automation, which aligns well with Giga's mission to deploy real-time AI agents for customer experience. The candidate's proven track record in closing complex deals and scaling partner ecosystems across multiple regions complements Giga's ambitions to become a leading AI platform for enterprise automation. However, the candidate may need to adapt to Giga's specific technology stack and engineering-focused culture, which could present a slight gap in their experience.

title: Founding Account Executive | SaaS | Martech | AI | 60M Series A |
companyindustry: Software Development and IT System Custom Software Development
descriptionhtml:
Founding Account Executive, EMEA

📍 London (Hybrid)

💰 £160k–£220k OTE (50/50 split) + Equity


There are not many opportunities where you can join an AI company this early, build an entire region from scratch, and do it at a business that’s already scaling at an insane pace.

This is one of them.


An AI software company operating in the AI search / content visibility space is hiring its first commercial hires in Europe. They help brands improve how they appear inside tools like ChatGPT, Claude and Perplexity — a huge shift that’s changing how companies think about SEO, content and customer acquisition.


The growth is what really stands out:

  • Grew from ~$3M → ~$15M → nearly ~$20M ARR in a very short period
  • Targeting ~$60M ARR next
  • Team scaled from ~40 → 150 people YoY
  • Raised a major Series B from top-tier investors
  • Already generating meaningful European revenue without a local sales team
  • US sales team massively outperforming — majority of reps over target, multiple at 150-200%+


🏋️ What you’ll do

  • Be one of the first GTM hires in EMEA
  • Own the full sales cycle from outbound through close
  • Sell into Mid-Market and Enterprise companies
  • Typical buyers: CMOs, VP Marketing, senior commercial stakeholders
  • Build pipeline, close deals and help shape the EMEA GTM motion
  • Work directly with US leadership while operating with high autonomy
  • Help lay the foundations for the future EMEA team


🔍 What they’re looking for

  • 3-7 years of B2B SaaS closing experience
  • Strong hunter mentality and ability to self-source pipeline
  • Proven top performer (President’s Club / consistent overachievement)
  • Experience selling to senior stakeholders
  • Someone comfortable in fast-moving, early stage, high-growth environments
  • High ownership, strong communication and genuine builder mentality


Nice to have:

  • AI / Martech / SEO / data platform exposure
  • Startup or founding AE experience
  • Additional European languages


🚀 Why this is interesting

This is not joining a slow-moving enterprise business with layers of process already built.

It’s joining a company that already has serious momentum, in one of the hottest areas in AI right now, at the exact point they’re starting to scale internationally.


For the right person, this is the kind of role that can completely accelerate a career.

fit_explanation: This job is a strong fit for the candidate, as their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and building go-to-market strategies aligns well with the founding Account Executive role at Bluebird. The candidate's background in AI systems and B2B sales pipeline automation directly complements Bluebird's focus on AI-driven solutions for content visibility, positioning them to effectively drive sales in this innovative space. Additionally, their proven ability to scale partner ecosystems across diverse regions will be invaluable in establishing Bluebird's presence in the EMEA market.

title: Head of Sales,  EMEA North – Founding Role (Remote)
descriptionhtml:
Emporix is an AI-driven Autonomous Commerce Execution Platform that gives enterprises full control over how their commerce works. It orchestrates operations end-to-end—so companies can scale faster, respond smarter, and deliver better customer experiences.


We’re now looking for the first dedicated sales hire for EMEA North - someone who will take ownership of our revenue growth in the region, collaborating across the business to build a sustainable foundation.


You will be the first sales-focused person in the region, responsible for developing pipeline, winning customers, and establishing Emporix as a strong player across EMEA North.

This role is ideal for someone who combines a drive for results with a collaborative spirit, thrives in a high-trust environment, and is motivated by shaping something from the start.


What You’ll Be Doing


Owning & Building the Region

  • Lead the strategy and growth of the EMEA North market (UK, Nordics, Netherlands, and beyond).
  • Define and execute the regional go-to-market approach.
  • Identify target industries, accounts, and growth opportunities.
  • Act as the primary commercial point of contact in the region.


Winning and Closing Deals

  • Own the full sales cycle end-to-end — from prospecting to closing.
  • Engage with both mid-market and enterprise customers.
  • Navigate complex sales cycles with multiple stakeholders.
  • Lead negotiations and close high-value deals.


Building Pipeline from Scratch

  • Cultivate a robust and sustainable pipeline through strategic outreach and relationship-driven market development.
  • Proactively identify and engage new prospects.
  • Build a strong and sustainable pipeline in a new market.


Partner & Ecosystem Collaboration

  • Work closely with our Head of Ecosystem and Internationalisation to leverage partner-driven opportunities and market initiatives.
  • Collaborate with partners on co-selling opportunities while maintaining ownership of the sales cycle.
  • Contribute to building a scalable, partner-influenced go-to-market model in the region.


Solution Selling & Customer Value

  • Run discovery sessions and workshops to understand customer needs.
  • Position Emporix across digital commerce.
  • Collaborate with Pre-Sales, Product, and Marketing to deliver tailored solutions.


Market Development & Representation

  • Act as a brand ambassador and thought leader.
  • Build strong relationships with key stakeholders and decision-makers.
  • Provide structured feedback to Product and Marketing based on market insights.


Forecasting & Reporting

  • Maintain accurate CRM data and pipeline visibility.
  • Provide reliable forecasts and performance updates.
  • Keep track of market trends and competitor activity.


What We’re Looking For

  • Since this is a foundational role, we are looking for a pioneering spirit who is ready to step into their first Head of Sales position.
  • Passion for AI-driven innovation and the role it plays in shaping the future of commerce.
  • You have a proven track record in SaaS sales, ideally within digital commerce, PIM, order management, or similar ecosystems.
  • You are experienced in navigating both mid-market and enterprise landscapes, understanding the unique needs of each.
  • You possess a natural ability to identify high-potential opportunities and foster long-term customer success.
  • You are impact-oriented, bringing a proactive and thoughtful approach to solving complex challenges.
  • You take pride in a structured and disciplined approach, ensuring consistency as you build the region’s sales engine.
  • You thrive in a startup environment, valuing the high level of trust, ownership, and autonomy that comes with a "ground floor" role.
  • You understand the power of partnerships, with experience (or a strong interest) in collaborating within ecosystem-driven sales models.
  • You are a clear and empathetic communicator, skilled at managing diverse stakeholders and building rapport quickly.
  • You are fluent in English (additional European languages are a wonderful plus).
  • You are energized by travel, ready to meet customers and partners across the region and occasionally connect with the wider team in person.


Location

This role is remote-friendly, based in one of these locations:

  • Netherlands
  • Nordics
  • United Kingdom


Why You’ll Love It Here

  • Ownership from Day One – Directly influence the trajectory of our international growth.
  • Supportive Leadership – We believe in high autonomy supported by high-quality mentorship.
  • Inclusive Culture – A seat at the table where your voice directly influences the company’s direction.
  • Growth Opportunity – Opportunity to evolve into a leadership role as the region scales.
  • Strong Product & Market Fit – Work with a modern commerce platform solving real enterprise challenges.
  • Flexibility & Travel – Enjoy a remote-friendly role with regular travel to meet customers, partners, and bring the team together in person.
  • Come as you are - We are building an AI-driven future for commerce, and that requires a variety of perspectives. Emporix is an equal opportunity employer where your skills and pragmatic approach to driving growth are what matter most. We encourage candidates of all genders and backgrounds to apply and help us expand our presence across EMEA North. Even if you don’t check every single box in this description, but you are passionate about building relationships and strategic leadership, we’d love to meet you.

reason: The role involves building a sales strategy for a technology company focused on enterprise clients.
fit_explanation: This job is a strong fit for the candidate due to their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and their proven ability to close complex deals across diverse regions, including Europe and the Middle East. The candidate's background in building go-to-market strategies and scaling partner ecosystems aligns well with the founding role at Emporix, where they will need to establish a sustainable sales foundation and drive revenue growth. Additionally, their expertise in AI and B2B sales pipeline automation complements Emporix's focus on AI-driven commerce solutions, making them well-suited to contribute to the company's objectives.

title: Account Executive - EMEA
descriptionhtml:
In-house legal teams are under more pressure than ever, often trapped in a constant flow of requests, redlines, reviews, and urgent internal demands.

The Europe's leading legal AI firm is tackling this head-on. Its platform acts as the operational hub for modern legal departments, streamlining everything from intake and Q&A to drafting, research, and contract iteration. The mission: transform legal from a bottleneck into a strategic, high-velocity function.

We're hiring an Account Executive to drive new revenue across complex, high-value accounts. You'll manage strategic sales cycles end-to-end, engaging with senior stakeholders across Legal, Ops, IT, and Procurement.

You should be comfortable navigating long, multi-threaded enterprise motions, building consensus across diverse teams, and articulating commercial value with clarity and credibility. You'll also partner closely with SDRs, Marketing, and Product as we refine our go-to-market engine.

Key Responsibilities

  • Manage full-cycle sales for upper mid-market and enterprise prospects, typically over 3-9 months
  • Build deep, multi-stakeholder relationships across legal and operational leadership
  • Lead investigative discovery, craft compelling ROI narratives, and run structured proof-of-value programs
  • Deliver high-quality demos and maintain rigorous forecasting discipline
  • Consistently exceed quarterly revenue commitments while protecting deal velocity
  • Influence product and GTM direction based on customer insights
  • Maintain meticulous CRM hygiene and operate with a data-driven mindset

Requirements

  • Minimum 5+ years selling SaaS solutions, ideally involving layered enterprise buying groups
  • A history of exceeding quota at ACVs $150k+
  • Exposure to Dutch/European market, multi-threaded legal deals
  • Expertise in value-led, consultative selling and strong executive communication
  • Ability to orchestrate alignment across Legal, IT, Procurement, and Finance
  • High levels of curiosity, discipline, and resilience in fast-moving environments
  • Strong organisational instincts, supported by clean, metrics-focused pipeline habits

Benefits

  • €60,000 to €80,000 base + attractive commission + accelerators & equity
  • Career Path: Progression routes into Strategic AE or Sales Leadership

  • Minimum 5+ years selling SaaS solutions, ideally involving layered enterprise buying groups
  • A history of exceeding quota at ACVs $150k+

  • Strong organisational instincts, supported by clean, metrics-focused pipeline habits

Benefits

  • €60,000 to €80,000 base + attractive commission + accelerators & equity
  • Career Path: Progression routes into Strategic AE or Sales Leadership

title: Head of Sales
descriptionhtml:

Helical is building the AI-native lab for biology; replacing slow, costly wet lab experimentation with scalable, virtual discovery. Our platform is already deployed with leading global pharma, enabling teams to run millions of experiments in days, not years.

We have product-market traction. Now we're scaling and looking for someone to build and lead that journey.

We're hiring a Head of Sales to own new business and build Helical's commercial function from the ground up.

This is a player-coach role. You'll be responsible for closing high-value deals yourself, while also shaping how we go to market; defining the playbook, building pipeline, and laying the foundations for a high-performing commercial team.

This is not a "manage and inherit" role. This is build, sell, and scale.

Requirements

Win New Business

  • Land new logos across top pharma and large biotech
  • Own the full sales cycle from prospecting to close
  • Navigate complex, multi-stakeholder deals with scientific buyers
  • Turn initial deals into long-term, multi-program partnerships

Build the GTM Engine

  • Define and execute the go-to-market strategy
  • Build repeatable pipeline, qualification, and forecasting processes
  • Implement AI-first sales workflows across prospecting and pipeline management
  • Hire, mentor, and scale the early commercial team

Drive Strategic Growth

  • Develop partnerships across pharma, tech, and research ecosystems
  • Expand Helical's footprint through high-value relationships and collaborations

Be the Market Face

  • Represent Helical with credibility at key industry events and conferences
  • Build relationships with decision-makers in discovery, computational biology, and AI

Who You Are

  • Proven track record of closing complex enterprise deals and winning new logos
  • Experience building GTM and sales functions from scratch (early-stage environments)
  • Strong ability to sell into technical and scientific stakeholders
  • Comfortable operating in ambiguity and owning outcomes end-to-end
  • AI-first mindset—you leverage AI across your workflows to drive better results
  • Deep interest in how AI is transforming drug discovery

Benefits

  • Proven product already in use with top pharma
  • Opportunity to shape a category-defining company at an inflection point
  • High ownership, direct impact, and close collaboration with founders
  • Clear trajectory to CRO / full commercial leadership
  • Competitive Salary, Equity and Benefits

title: Founding Enterprise Sales
descriptionhtml:
First dedicated sales hire. Build the enterprise sales motion from the ground up on top of a product that already sells itself - 3M ARR with zero outbound.

  • Pipeline: identify and close enterprise deals - companies already using Windmill's open-source or evaluating it against competitors.
  • Technical sales: run demos, handle technical objections, work with engineering on custom deployment needs. You'll be selling to platform teams, DevOps leads, and CTOs.
  • Process: build the sales playbook, CRM hygiene, pricing conversations, contract negotiation.
  • Feedback loop: bring market signal back to product - what enterprises need, what competitors are doing, where we win and lose.

Who We're Looking For

  • Devtool / developer platform background is essential. You've sold to or worked closely with engineering teams. You understand what developers care about, what "open-core" means, and how PLG and sales coexist.
  • Engineering background or strong technical fluency - you can read docs, understand APIs, and hold your own in a technical conversation.
  • 2–6 years in B2B SaaS sales, solutions engineering, or developer relations with a commercial angle.
  • Experience selling to large enterprise companies (public companies, Fortune 500) is a big plus. Our target buyers are platform and infrastructure teams at companies with serious compliance, procurement, and security requirements.
  • Scrappy, autonomous, comfortable building from zero. This is a founding role, not a quota-carrying seat in a 50-person sales org.
  • US experience strongly preferred - American applicants or candidates with extensive experience selling to US companies. The vast majority of our enterprise pipeline is US-based.
  • Fluent in English; French or German is a plus for European enterprise.

Example projects in your first 3 months

  • Take over and close 2–3 enterprise deals already in the pipeline - learn the product by selling it
  • Build the outbound playbook targeting platform teams at mid-market companies already using Windmill's open-source
  • Run a competitive displacement campaign against competitors at accounts where we have developer champions
  • Set up the CRM, deal stages, and forecasting

Offer details

Location: France or US

Compensation: base (location-dependent) + 10% commission on revenue generated

  • 2–6 years in B2B SaaS sales, solutions engineering, or developer relations with a commercial angle.
  • Experience selling to large enterprise companies (public companies, Fortune 500) is a big plus. Our target buyers are platform and infrastructure teams at companies with serious compliance, procurement, and security requirements.
  • Scrappy, autonomous, comfortable building from zero. This is a founding role, not a quota-carrying seat in a 50-person sales org.
  • US experience strongly preferred - American applicants or candidates with extensive experience selling to US companies. The vast majority of our enterprise pipeline is US-based.
  • Fluent in English; French or German is a plus for European enterprise.

Example projects in your first 3 months

  • Take over and close 2–3 enterprise deals already in the pipeline - learn the product by selling it
  • Build the outbound playbook targeting platform teams at mid-market companies already using Windmill's open-source
  • Run a competitive displacement campaign against competitors at accounts where we have developer champions
  • Set up the CRM, deal stages, and forecasting

Offer details

Location: France or US

Compensation: base (location-dependent) + 10% commission on revenue generated
reason: The role involves building the enterprise sales strategy and selling to large companies.
fit_explanation: This job is a strong fit for the candidate due to their extensive experience in enterprise technology sales and their proven ability to build go-to-market strategies from scratch, which aligns perfectly with Windmill's need for a founding sales leader. The candidate's background in selling complex solutions, including open-source platforms, directly matches the company's focus on selling its product to technical teams like DevOps leads and CTOs. However, there may be a gap in the candidate's experience with specific CRM tools or sales processes unique to Windmill, which could require some adjustment during the transition.

title: Head of Sales
descriptionhtml:
Head of Sales - Founding Sales Hire
📍 London (Hybrid)

About the Company

We are a high-growth fintech building critical infrastructure at the intersection of hard assets and finance. Backed by leading venture capital firms and seasoned founders, we are redefining how physical assets-such as energy storage, robotics, batteries, and heat pumps-are accessed, financed, and scaled in modern markets.

The Opportunity

This is a career-defining opportunity to join as the company's first sales hire. Working directly with the CEO and founders, you will bridge the gap between enterprise software and structured finance, transitioning from a hands-on builder to a leader of a global sales organisation.

The Mission

* Revenue Ownership: Own the full sales cycle, from pipeline generation through to closing and account expansion.
* GTM Collaboration: Work closely with leadership to refine and strengthen go-to-market strategy through feedback and execution.
* Process Design: Build and implement scalable sales infrastructure and repeatable revenue streams.
* Financial Integration: Develop and nurture key relationships across structured finance, credit risk, origination, treasury, and capital markets.
* Team Building: Recruit, hire, and lead the future sales team as the company scales.

Who You Are

* The Startup Specialist: Proven success in a high-growth startup or scale-up environment.
* Domain Expert: Experience in enterprise software, finance, sales, and complex B2B integrations.
* Complex Closer: Strong expierance managing multi-stakeholder deal cycles.
* Builder Mindset: Hands-on, commercially driven operator with a strong focus on achieving targets and scaling revenue.

What's in it for You

* Equity participation to share in the company's long-term success
* High-impact foundational role with significant influence on company trajectory
* Direct exposure to founders and C-suite leadership
* High-performance hybrid working environment in Shoreditch
* Benefits including cycle-to-work schemes and unlimited holiday


We Are Aspire Ltd are a Disability Confident Committed employer
